ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "professional_since" TEXT /* Date when the player turned professional */,
  "primary_hand" TEXT /* Primary hand (right or left) of the player */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the player's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "total_prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par score for the tournament */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the tournament's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position in the tournament */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player */,
  "total_putts" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made by the player */,
  "total_drives" INTEGER /* Total number of drives made by the player */,
  "total_approach_shots" INTEGER /* Total number of approach shots made by the player */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the participation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_participation_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_participation_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approach_shots" (
  "approach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approach shot record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank last week */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance of approach shots */,
  "total_distance_feet" REAL /* Total distance in feet of approach shots */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts */,
  "relative_to_par" REAL /* Relative to par performance */,
  "total_par_3_shots" INTEGER /* Total number of approach shots on par-3 holes */,
  "total_par_4_shots" INTEGER /* Total number of approach shots on par-4 holes */,
  "total_par_5_shots" INTEGER /* Total number of approach shots on par-5 holes */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the approach shot record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approach_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "putting" (
  "putting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each putting record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank last week */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "average_putts_per_round" REAL /* Average putts per round */,
  "total_putts" INTEGER /* Total number of putts */,
  "putts_inside_3_feet" INTEGER /* Number of putts made inside 3 feet */,
  "putts_missed_inside_3_feet" INTEGER /* Number of putts missed inside 3 feet */,
  "total_putts_outside_10_feet" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made outside 10 feet */,
  "total_putts_inside_10_feet" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made inside 10 feet */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the putting record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("putting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_putting_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driving" (
  "driving_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driving record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank last week */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "average_drive_distance" REAL /* Average drive distance */,
  "total_drives" INTEGER /* Total number of drives */,
  "accuracy_percentage" REAL /* Accuracy percentage */,
  "total_fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Total number of fairways hit */,
  "total_fairways_missed" INTEGER /* Total number of fairways missed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the driving record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driving_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driving_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user record */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., feet, meters, percentage) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the performance metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
